summary: 4 unit tests added to test_game_flow.gd covering _on_faction_ending_chosen(). Static code analysis confirms all 4 guard clauses work correctly. Tests now in codebase.

findings.description: _store=null guard: 'if _store == null or not MerlinConstants.FACTIONS.has(faction): return' prevents crash and write. Test: _test_faction_ending_chosen_null_store()

Invalid faction guard: 'not MerlinConstants.FACTIONS.has(faction)' uses ['druides','anciens','korrigans','niamh','ankou']. Rejects arbitrary strings. Test: _test_faction_ending_chosen_invalid_faction()
Duplicate prevention: 'if not seen.has(faction): seen.append(faction)' prevents double-recording. Test: _test_faction_ending_chosen_no_duplicate()
Valid faction recording: druides → stored in echo_memory.dominant_factions_seen array. Test: _test_faction_ending_chosen_valid()
